Tutorials

Step-by-step guides to set up and use AI tools. Practical, tested, beginner-friendly.

How to Use Hermes Agent: Self-Improving AI Agent Framework

Learn how to set up and use Hermes Agent, the open-source AI agent that learns and improves over time with persistent memory and automated skill creation.

Hermes Agent Intermediate ⏱️ 45 minutes

Create Professional Images with Nano Banana Pro: Text-to-Image Generation and Editing

Learn how to use Google's Nano Banana Pro AI model for generating and editing images with accurate text rendering and precise creative controls

Nano Banana Pro Beginner ⏱️ 20 minutes

Automate Your Workflow with Google Workspace Studio: A Step-by-Step Tutorial

Learn how to build AI-powered automations in Gmail, Sheets, and Forms using Google's free no-code automation platform

Google Workspace Studio Beginner ⏱️ 25 minutes

Automate Your Schedule and Tasks with Carly AI

Learn how to use Carly AI to automate scheduling, task management, and CRM workflows via email and SMS - no app needed

Carly AI Beginner ⏱️ 15 minutes

How to Use DeepSeek V4 for Coding and Document Analysis: A Solopreneur's Guide

Learn how to leverage DeepSeek V4's 1M token context window and cost-effective AI for coding services and large document processing

DeepSeek V4 Intermediate ⏱️ 15 minutes

Create Professional AI Videos with HeyGen — No Camera Required

Learn how to use HeyGen to create talking-head videos with AI avatars, translate content into 175+ languages, and scale your video marketing without a studio.

HeyGen Beginner ⏱️ 25 minutes

Automate Your Email with Lindy AI in 15 Minutes

Set up Lindy AI to triage your inbox, draft replies, and schedule meetings automatically. A practical step-by-step tutorial.

Lindy AI Beginner ⏱️ 15 minutes

Build Your First AI Workflow with n8n (No Code)

n8n is the open-source Zapier alternative with native AI support. Here's how to build an automated lead processing workflow from scratch.

n8n Intermediate ⏱️ 45 minutes

How to Set Up OpenClaw: Complete Beginner's Guide

OpenClaw went viral in 2026. Here's how to install it, connect your tools, and run your first AI agent — no coding required.

OpenClaw Beginner ⏱️ 30 minutes
